# ANALYSIS: WATCHER FLEET NEGATIVE P&L ANALYSIS

**Filed:** 2026-05-21
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** analysis → operationalization
**Status:** COMPLETE (findings integrated into leaderboard candidates #3, #5, #9)

## Background

The inbox requested analysis of three watchers from the Gamma_WatcherGrader fleet snapshot:
- **v14_enhanced_watcher**: -$2,150 (N=499)
- **bullish_watcher**: -$1,128 (N=288)
- **orb_watcher**: +$7,161 (N=391)

## Findings Summary

### 1. v14_enhanced_watcher — FINDINGS ALREADY INTEGRATED

**Leaderboard candidate #3 (V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE)** already processed this watcher:

| Tier | N | WR | P&L |
|---|---|---|---|
| Bear branch (all) | 241 | 58.5% | +$1,492 |
| Bull branch (all) | 261 | 47.9% | -$3,642 |
| Bear + high confidence | 33 | 84.8% | +$1,173 |

**Conclusion:** Bull branch is structural drag. Bear-only filter captures +$1,173 from best sub-tier. This is already captured in candidate #3.

### 2. bullish_watcher — FINDINGS ALREADY INTEGRATED

**Leaderboard candidate #9 (BULLISH_WATCHER_PM_GATE)** already processed this watcher:

| Tier | N | WR | P&L |
|---|---|---|---|
| AM (10-12) | 228 | 43.9% | -$1,756 |
| PM (13-15) | 61 | 65.6% | +$628 |

**Conclusion:** PM session shows positive expectancy. AM is structural drag. This is already captured in candidate #9.

### 3. orb_watcher — FINDINGS ALREADY INTEGRATED

**Leaderboard candidate #5 (ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER)** already processed this watcher:

| Scenario | N | WR | P&L |
|---|---|---|---|
| Long-only (all) | 274 | 70.4% | +$7,378 |
| Narrow OR + long-only | 143 | 90.2% | +$4,597 |

**Conclusion:** Long-only gate preserves 99% of P&L while simplifying implementation. This is already captured in candidate #5.
